title: ELP advises Prozone Realty on $32 million stake acquisition in material subsidiaries
description: Prozone Realty Limited and its group company, Prozone Liberty International Limited, together with their wholly owned subsidiary, Kruti Developers Private Limited (collectively, the PRL Group), have made a strategic consolidation of equity stakes in three key Indian project companies – Alliance Mall Developers Co.
